title: Phase handoffs
implementation_effect: Versioned typed internal contracts; no silent downstream rewrite

title: Compile a phase-specific Context Graph
implementation_effect: Declare included governed context slots, exclusions, conditional exposure and unload semantics per phase without selecting minimum-complete context

title: Use versioned typed phase handoff contracts
implementation_effect: Declare producer, consumers, required and optional fields, provenance, authority, validation, compatibility, mutability and invalidation

title: Prohibit silent downstream rewriting
implementation_effect: Downstream phases consume immutable authoritative values; changes require new upstream versions

title: Validate ownership and dependency impact
implementation_effect: Every field has one owner and invalidation is limited to affected descendants

title: Missing Required Dependency Or Authority
implementation_effect: Missing phase, field, dependency or authority blocks commit

title: Explicit ownership integrity
implementation_effect: Every authoritative contract and field has explicit non-conflicting ownership
